name: IDSS 2025
desc: IDSS is a web application that helps manage and monitor distribution processes efficiently, including warehouse control, real-time tracking, and reporting.

name: SIS 2025
desc: A web-based School Information System for managing students, teachers, classes, attendance, grades, and school administration efficiently.

name: POS System
desc: A web-based Point of Sale (POS) system designed to manage sales transactions, inventory, customers, and financial reports efficiently.

name: E-Kasir System
desc: An electronic cashier system is used to manage sales and payment transactions in a business, such as a retail store, restaurant, or cafe.

name: SPK Website
desc: Decision Support System for best employee selection that helps companies assess employees objectively based on predetermined criteria.
